This must stop | James A Goldston and Natasha Arnpriester  The Guardian

item.description: IDF has solution for Hezbollah's FPV drones, Eyal Zamir says from Lebanon  The Jerusalem PostHezbollah’s Drones Have Become a Top Threat to Israel  WSJLearning from Ukraine war, Hezbollah is now using fibre-optic drones to hit Israel  BBCSoldier killed in Hezbollah drone attack as Israel widens strikes on terror group  The Times of IsraelDefense establishment developing new solutions against Hezbollah's fiber-optic FPV drones  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: NY case sheds light on alleged Iran-linked terror campaign targeting Diaspora Jews...
item.description: NY case sheds light on alleged Iran-linked terror campaign targeting Diaspora Jews  The Times of IsraelMohammad Baqer al-Saadi: Profiling an IRGC and Iraqi Militia Operative  Combating Terrorism Center at West PointDual Iranian-Iraqi National Indicted For Providing Material Support To Terrorist Organizations  Department of Justice (.gov)The Telegram Network That Facilitated Kata’ib Hizbullah’s Attack Campaign in Europe  Homeland Security TodayIranian, Iraqi national indicted for terrorism against Jewish targets  The Jerusalem Post
